title: Implement manager assignment center API contract
description: Harden backend support for the manager assignment center by adding deterministic queue detail and action evidence around assignment work items while preserving manager-only guardrails and stable meta contract fields.
acceptance_criteria: Manager assignment center exposes deterministic queue detail contract for a queue item or assignment work item
Queue action responses return stable meta contract, flow, and reason fields for manager completion/retry operations
Unauthorized, forbidden, not-found, and validation behavior remain deterministic for manager assignment center routes
Feature tests cover new assignment center API contract without regressing prior manager dashboard and handoff behavior
